step.name: brief
step.action: Author 1-page kickoff brief; resolve workstream owners both sides.

step.name: draft
step.action: Build 8-12 slide deck; top-5 risks; numbered decision asks.

step.name: internal-review
step.action: Agency-side review: are asks decision-shaped? Owners named?

step.name: run-kickoff
step.action: Run the meeting; force each decision-ask answered before adjourning.

step.name: publish-log
step.action: Publish deck + decision log + comms-cadence agreement.
